metadata.description: AI-DLC v2 — installer plugin shipping upstream awslabs/aidlc-workflows Claude Code target at pinned releases

plugins.name: aidlc-v2
plugins.description: AI-DLC v2 for Claude Code — installer plugin for the AI-Driven Development Lifecycle. Ships awslabs/aidlc-workflows own Claude Code target (verbatim, at a pinned release) and installs/updates it in your project via /aidlc-v2:aidlc.
